历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking changed from approximately 19309 to 17574 to 17064 to 15239, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 4070 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 15239, reflecting the university's growing popularity among Sichuan science students. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 116 in 2022, 114 in 2023, 114 in 2024, and 123 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 131, an increase of about 6.5% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks about 38th (2026), with a stable range of 36–39 in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 985 universities, with outstanding engineering strength. In 2025, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a drowning incident involving 6 mineral processing students during an internship), which suppressed the psychology of applicants that year. In 2026, the reputation is neutral/mixed (due to the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus), with no significant negative impact. Its Douyin popularity is average (ranked 82nd overall), with low short video exposure. Control Science and Engineering is A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, Software Engineering is A-, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Materials Science and Engineering is A-, and Metallurgical Engineering is A. The overall engineering strength is strong, continuously attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Computer Science has cooled from high recommendation in 2023 to recommendation in 2024, while Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, closely matching Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines. In 2025, the number of physics category students in the province was about 285,000, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is 535,000, with an estimated 329,000 in the physics category, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. In 2025, the physics undergraduate batch line was 438 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 518 points. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, in the Northeast region. Sichuan students have some regional preference differences towards Northeast universities, but the 985 level can partially offset regional concerns. The university has a relatively large enrollment plan in Sichuan (over 100 in the physics category), making it one of the universities with higher enrollment among out-of-province 985 institutions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (increased popularity), a 6.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 but a 15.6% increase in provincial physics category examinees (net competition increase of about 9%), neutral reputation with no additional negative impact, and strong engineering disciplines continuously attracting high-scoring students, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 16034, with a range of 15534–16534.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhiying Talent Class)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering (Special Class) / Computer Science (including Software Engineering, Information Security, Virtual Reality Technology)
- Robotics Engineering
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Vacuum Engineering and Technology, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Design)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Physics, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (including Metallurgical Engineering, Environmental Science, Resource Recycling Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (2) (including Mineral Processing Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology, Resource Exploration Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Safety Engineering, Civil Engineering)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Finance, Economics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 16034, with a range of 15534–16534. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main focus, Tier 1 for sprinting, and Tier 3 as a safety net. For rankings better than the lower limit (<15534), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation. For rankings near the upper limit (>16534), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes and the Economics and Management Experimental Class, while also considering Tier 2 mid-level majors.
